Notifications & Alerts

Daily summary at 9 AM

Full Data Backup
Auto-save is ON
Your data is automatically saved on this device. Use Export to save a complete copy of everything — all patients, appointments, finance, marketing, photos, and settings.
Exports everything in one JSON file: all patients + photos, appointments, reminders, finance (all months), marketing (all months), labs, stores, settings, and theme. Save to iCloud, email it, or AirDrop to another device.
Doctors
Add clinic doctors with their WhatsApp number to enable doctor reminders.
Blacklist
Patients you've flagged. You'll be warned before booking them an appointment.
Import patients from a JSON file. Existing patients won't be duplicated. Patients without a visit date won't be marked as "Never Visited".
